name: pingarden
description: Self-hostable, real-time collaborative tool for Strategyzer-style strategy canvases

scripts.build:skill-pack: pnpm --filter @pingarden/cli run build && node apps/cli/dist/index.js skill install --local && node scripts/build-skill-pack.mjs
scripts.test:ai: pnpm --filter @pingarden/shared run build && pnpm --filter @pingarden/shared exec vitest run src/copilotStructured.test.ts src/copilotReferenceResolver.test.ts && pnpm --filter @pingarden/web exec vitest run src/copilot/projectDraft.test.ts src/copilot/storyCanvasReferences.test.ts src/copilot/useKeyConfig.test.ts src/copilot/useCopilotModelRouter.test.ts src/api/copilot.test.ts && pnpm --filter @pingarden/server exec vitest run src/llm/kimiCliAdapter.test.ts src/llm/kimiHttpProvider.test.ts src/llm/minimaxHttpProvider.test.ts src/llm/copilotAiRouter.test.ts && pnpm --filter @pingarden/cli exec vitest run src/commands/reference.test.ts && node scripts/check-skill-parity.mjs
